scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @nxinmall/database exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/types build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/constants build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/validators build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/database build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/web build
scripts.vercel-build-api: pnpm --filter @nxinmall/database exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/types build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/validators build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/database build && pnpm --filter @nxinmall/api build
